01 · The Network

Reach you can verify.

Six owned channels, one coordinated broadcast, a 30-deep amplifier crew on every drop. Over a million combined followers — and impressions that outrun the follower math, because the crew piles into every post. We don't rent influencers. We own the signal, and we share the analytics on every campaign.

02 · The Apps

Built to ship.
Shipping now.

Free, provably-fair skill games for iOS — each its own product with its own page. STAK is live on the App Store. Pulse and FUSE are in Apple review. PRISM is next. No ads, no accounts, server-verified scores.

03 · INSERT COIN

The network also plays.

An on-chain arcade and a live PvP floor. Eight games built in-house on verified score rails with server-side anti-cheat — every score replayed before it posts. Branded cabinets, sponsored tournaments, and high-score bounties are bookable inventory.

04 · REACHFI Studios

We build it.
Then we launch it.

The production wing. The same pipeline that ships our own titles is for hire: apps to both stores, custom games on verified rails, launch pages in 48 hours — or the full play, where the network carries the launch after we build it. Fixed quotes, prepaid, you own the keys.

Enter the studio →Commission a build →
05 · Novex

Our own exchange.
Live numbers.

A perps DEX we built and grew ourselves — the clearest proof the network drives real on-chain activity, not just views. Terminal, quests, and an academy, all under one roof. The numbers are public.

Open Novex →Why it matters →
The Proof

Everyone shows views.
We show what shipped.

Impressions are easy to fake and easy to forget. Shipped products aren't. Here's what the building has actually put on the board.

Apps · Exhibit A
Live
STAK is on the App Store. Pulse and FUSE are in Apple review — three apps through the pipeline in thirty days.
Arcade · Exhibit B
8 games
Eight titles built in-house on verified score rails, with a live PvP floor. The portfolio is playable, not screenshots.
Novex · Exhibit C
Real volume
A perps DEX we built and grew ourselves, with a public trading dashboard. We grow projects by pointing at the ones we own.
Network · Exhibit D
1M+
Six owned channels, over a million combined followers, a 30-deep crew. Owned reach with analytics we control.
Studios · Exhibit E
48 hrs
Landing pages live in two days; two apps from final build to Apple review in one. The pipeline is warm and for hire.
The Standard
Verified
Every score replayed server-side. Every campaign reported with real analytics. Honest numbers are the whole brand.
